# GTM India

> A practitioner-led sales and go-to-market community for B2B professionals across India.

GTM India exists for the people doing the actual work — account executives, sales engineers, presales professionals, and revenue leaders who want to get better at the craft of selling and go-to-market execution. No theory. No vendor pitches. Just real practitioners sharing what works.

## What GTM India does

- Runs in-person events across Bangalore, Mumbai, Hyderabad, and Delhi
- Hosts structured programmes including SELF (Sales Enablement Leadership Forum) and the Presales India track
- Brings together CROs, VPs of Sales, Heads of Presales, and field practitioners for peer learning
- Focuses on discovery, value engineering, executive alignment, and decision confidence — the skills that win complex B2B deals

## Who it's for

B2B sales and GTM professionals based in India, particularly those in:
- Enterprise and mid-market sales roles
- Presales and sales engineering
- Revenue leadership (CRO, VP Sales, Head of GTM)
- Sales enablement and operations

## Community

GTM India is city-based and community-run. Events are kept small and practitioner-only. The emphasis is on honest conversation, not polished presentations.

## Links

- Homepage: https://gtmindia.co
- Events: https://gtmindia.co/events
- Presales India: https://gtmindia.co/presales-india
- About: https://gtmindia.co/about
